# Blim

> Xitoy tilini online o'rganish platformasi. HSK 1-6 darslari, dialoglar, fleshkartalar va karaoke.

## Sections

- [Xitoy tili darslari](https://www.blim.uz/chinese): HSK 1-6 darajali dialoglar va darslar
- [Fleshkartalar](https://www.blim.uz/chinese/hsk1/flashcards): So'z boyligi uchun fleshkartalar
- [Karaoke](https://www.blim.uz/chinese/hsk1/karaoke/yueliang): Xitoy qo'shiqlari bilan o'rganish

## Notes

- Language: Uzbek and Russian
- Target audience: Uzbek and Russian speakers learning Chinese
- Pricing: 50,000 UZS/month
